title: carpesium nepalense var. lanatum
intro: Carpesium nepalense var. lanatum is a variant of the Carpesium nepalense plant, which is a perennial herb that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Carpesium nepalense var. lanatum include its potential to alleviate pain, reduce fever, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and aid in digestion. Carpesium nepalense var. lanatum can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional remedies for its purported health benefits.
